Interface IMultidimensionalInfo2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a multidimensional info value object.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("63236E74-1EF4-473D-A28B-0D0CDCD3274D")]
public interface IMultidimensionalInfo2 : IMultidimensionalInfo

Properties

Attributes

Global attributes associated with a dimensional definition.

IPropertySet Attributes { get; set; }

Property Value

IPropertySet
